# ItemType.WeaponFamily property

The raw weapon-family enum (payload `+0x30`): a coarse grouping shared across related weapons (e.g. Axe/Sword/Mace all share one value), or `-1` when this is not a weapon-slot item.

```csharp
public int WeaponFamily { get; }
```
